creator: rodomar705@gmail.com
text:
Sorry to bother you, however the port doesn't build anymore. Seems that one dependency from the tree has disappeared from the registry. Initially the idea was to try to update the port to the recently released 1.0, but desisted soon afterwards after seeing how are bigger the dependency tree. Tried to do the same for the single package (glob, if i'm not mistaken), but i'm literally overwhelmed by dependency and i can't get out of anywhere from there, besides getting more errors. Can you fix it?

Thanks for your work.
